degraded_reason: Parent implemented the selected lifecycle integration bead directly and used two independent reviewer subagents.
implementation_summary: Added an integration lifecycle test covering interrupt, resume, retry, compaction, cancellation, and generic error helpers together.

Verified the helpers share correlation identity, service metadata, metadata redaction, compaction summary redaction, retry attributes, cancellation error fields, and generic error fields through the no-network snapshot boundary.
Confirmed the lifecycle family satisfies the integrated event API acceptance criteria after the smaller helper beads were merged.
review_suggestion_summary: Consider adding explicit-correlation override coverage for a lifecycle helper.

Consider adding additional event-specific assertions for retry max attempts/classification, compaction before/after tokens, interrupt/resume reason/status, and error operation/classification attributes.
Consider asserting deterministic timestamps for each lifecycle observation and noting that Snapshot checks the post-redaction no-network export result.
